title: Yummy Font
description: My own stylized take on a font to change those stiff-looking letters.
body:
New free font, for free! (free)

A resource pack soley dedicated to tweaking the font of Minecraft.
Mainly wanted to make this because I felt like the original font got boring to look at (I like my letters stylish)

Will (probably) be tweaked more in the future as time goes on.

How it looks as of now:

![How the main menu looks with the RP enabled.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5987078e79629271d33917710523f4da7d932c27.png)
